tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
Hozier - Take Me To Church


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]                       [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
 My lover's got humor, she's the giggle at a funeral[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]                            [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]
Knows everybody's disapproval, I should've worshipped her sooner[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]                     [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
If the Heavens ever did speak, she’s the last true mouthpiece[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
Every Sunday's getting more bleak, a fresh poison each week[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]C[/ch]
We were born sick, you heard them say it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]                              [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
 My church offers no absolutes, she tells me 'worship in the bedroom'[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
The only heaven I'll be sent to is when I'm alone with you[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]
I was born sick, but I love it. Command me to be well[/tab]

[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
A-A-A-A-A-  Amen Amen Amen[/tab]


[Chorus]
   *
[tab](E)--3-2--2-1--|     [ch]Em[/ch]                                                   [ch]B7[/ch]
         Take me to church I'll worship like a dog at the shrine of your lies[/tab]
[tab]                                                 [ch]G[/ch]
I'll tell you my sins and you can sharpen your knife[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]Em[/ch]                     **  (E)--5-3--3-2--|
Offer me that deathless death, good God, let me give you my life[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em[/ch]                                                  [ch]B7[/ch]
Take me to church I'll worship like a dog at the shrine of your lies[/tab]
[tab]                                                [ch]G[/ch]
I'll tell you my sins so you can sharpen your knife[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]Em[/ch]                     **
Offer me that deathless death, good God, let me give you my life[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                      [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
 If I'm a pagan of the good times, my lover's the sunlight[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
To keep the Goddess on my side she demands a sacrifice[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]C[/ch]
Drain the whole sea, get something shiny[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                       [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]                       [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
 Something meaty for the main course, that's a fine looking high horse[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]                         [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
What you got in the stable? We've a lot of starving faithful[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]C[/ch]
That looks tasty, that looks plenty, this is hungry work[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]*            [ch]Em[/ch]                                                   [ch]B7[/ch]
 Take me to church I'll worship like a dog at the shrine of your lies[/tab]
[tab]                                                [ch]G[/ch]
I'll tell you my sins so you can sharpen your knife[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]Em[/ch]                     **
Offer me my deathless death, good God, let me give you my life[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em[/ch]                                                  [ch]B7[/ch]
Take me to church I'll worship like a dog at the shrine of your lies[/tab]
[tab]                                                [ch]G[/ch]
I'll tell you my sins so you can sharpen your knife[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]Em[/ch]                     **
Offer me my deathless death, good God, let me give you my life[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]B7[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]
 No masters or kings when the ritual begins[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]B7[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]
There is no sweeter innocence than our gentle sin[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]B7[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]
In the madness and soil of that sad earthly scene[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]B7[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G/B[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
Only then I am human, only then I am clean     Oh[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Cm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
Oh   Amen  Amen  Amen[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]*                [ch]Em[/ch]                                                   [ch]B7[/ch]
 Take me to church I'll worship like a dog at the shrine of your lies[/tab]
[tab]                                                 [ch]G[/ch]
I'll tell you my sins and you can sharpen your knife[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]Em[/ch]                     **
Offer me that deathless death, good God, let me give you my life[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em[/ch]                                                  [ch]B7[/ch]
Take me to church I'll worship like a dog at the shrine of your lies[/tab]
[tab]                                                 [ch]G[/ch]
I'll tell you my sins and you can sharpen your knife[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]Em[/ch]                     **  [ch]Em[/ch]
Offer me that deathless death, good God, let me give you my life[/tab]


(At * and ** play the tabbed bass notes.)
